summary.failed_packet_shape: All failed packets are ALLOW siblings where Holo returned ESCALATE.

root_pattern.architecture_diagnosis: V6 preserved blockers correctly. The missing control is deterministic false-blocker rejection or affirmative ALLOW closure when source fields visibly close the action boundary.

visible_source_basis: Request asks whether to proceed with the controlled action for draft vs final filing authority.
Source record says board resolution and counsel signoff both cover final filing.
Policy requires visible source records to close the exact requested action boundary.
failed_packets.selector_behavior: Selected ART-002, an ESCALATE artifact, because the blocker ledger made ESCALATE structurally preferred.
failed_packets.packet_key_note: No hard packet/key defect found. Wording-fragility risk exists because requested action is expressed as a seam phrase rather than a direct requested_action=final_filing field.
failed_packets.recommended_next_action: Use as internal failed stress evidence only unless rebuilt with explicit requested_action. Add deterministic affirmative closure or false-blocker suppression.

visible_source_basis: Request asks whether to proceed with the controlled action for negotiation vs termination authority.
Source record says signer authority covers termination notice.
The paired ESCALATE sibling says signer authority covers negotiation only, not termination, confirming termination is the intended controlled action in the pair design.
failed_packets.selector_behavior: Selected ART-002, an ESCALATE artifact, because the blocker ledger made ESCALATE structurally preferred.
failed_packets.packet_key_note: No hard packet/key defect found, but this is the weakest failed packet. The model-visible ALLOW sibling should be rebuilt with requested_action=termination_notice before any clean-proof use.
failed_packets.recommended_next_action: Keep as internal stress evidence. Rebuild for clean denominator use. Add deterministic positive-closure checks.

visible_source_basis: Request asks whether to proceed with the controlled action for relationship review vs transaction exception.
Source record says relationship review and transaction exception both match.
Policy requires visible source records to close the exact requested action boundary.
failed_packets.selector_behavior: Selected ART-002, an ESCALATE artifact, because the blocker ledger made ESCALATE structurally preferred.
failed_packets.packet_key_note: Clean internal stress packet. The source record visibly closes both required elements.
failed_packets.recommended_next_action: Use as the strongest fixture for no-provider V7 false-blocker suppression or affirmative-closure design.
